source.description: Six-panel raster contact sheet generated for the July 6, 2026 airport control tower sketch lesson, reviewed before cropping.
source.notes: Prompt required one consistent sketchbook control tower from construction to finished pencil sketch, with no embedded labels, arrows, numbers, signatures, or fake UI.

process_strategy: The sequence builds the tower shaft, observation cab, angled windows, antenna, runway base marks, and restrained sky shading before the final panel only darkens keeper lines and clarifies existing details.

final_elements.name: tall tower shaft
final_elements.description: A narrow tapered support rising from the page.

final_elements.name: wide observation cab
final_elements.description: A wider top room sitting on the tower shaft.

final_elements.name: slanted window band
final_elements.description: Angled panes wrapping around the cab.

final_elements.name: cab roof and antenna
final_elements.description: A low roof cap with a small antenna on top.

final_elements.name: base platform
final_elements.description: A simple footing and small platform at the bottom of the tower.

final_elements.name: runway perspective marks
final_elements.description: A few light runway lines behind the tower base.

final_elements.name: window shadows
final_elements.description: Soft graphite shading inside the already-drawn window panes.

final_elements.name: restrained sky color
final_elements.description: A pale blue wash around the tower that stays secondary to the pencil lines.

frames.visible_job: Blocks in the tapered tower shaft and wider observation cab with light construction lines.
Adds the slanted window band across the cab while keeping the main forms visible.
Adds the cab roof, small antenna, and base platform.
Places light runway perspective marks behind the base without changing the tower pose.
Adds soft window shadows and restrained sky color to the already-drawn tower.

final_step.visible_job: Darkens keeper contours, clarifies the window panes and antenna, strengthens the runway marks, and balances the pale sky color already present.

rejection_checks: No tower shaft, cab, window band, roof, antenna, base, runway mark, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
